response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no vocal music/dialogue). 2. JSON Usage: Scanned visual text for prominent announcements and instructions, ignoring individual fan letters to keep the subtitles focused and readable. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the key concert notices strictly to their visual durations during both appearance cycles in the slideshow.

subtitles.original: 開演までしばらくお待ちください。
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: 演出等での光の刺激にご注意ください。大きな声での応援もOKです！
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights during the performance. Cheering loudly is ok.
